sentence: 政府向灾区紧急运送了物资。
pinyin: Zhèngfǔ xiàng zāiqū jǐnjí yùnsòng le wùzī.
english: The government urgently dispatched supplies to the disaster area.

meaning: 1. developer (of real estate, a commercial product etc)
sentence: 开发商承诺小区明年竣工。
english: The developer promised the residential complex would be completed next year.

meaning: To settle (in some city, country etc)
sentence: 他毕业后决定在上海定居。
pinyin: Tā bìyè hòu juédìng zài Shànghǎi dìngjū.
english: After graduating, he decided to settle down in Shanghai.

meaning: 1. torrential rain; 2. rainstorm; 3. CL:場|场[cháng],陣|阵[zhèn]
sentence: 昨晚的暴雨把院子里的花都打倒了。
pinyin: Zuó wǎn de bào yǔ bǎ yuàn zi lǐ de huā dōu dǎ dǎo le.
english: Last night's rainstorm knocked over all the flowers in the yard.

sentence: 他在院子里搭了一个简易的棚子。
pinyin: Tā zài yuànzi lǐ dā le yī gè jiǎnyì de péngzi.
english: He put up a simple makeshift shed in the yard.
